statement: In every magma, Equation 921 (`x = y * ((y * y) * (y * z))`) implies Equation 1605 (`x = (y * z) * (w * (x * z))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0259
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op y y) (op y z)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op w (op x z)))
